name: Fawaz Abdulaziz AlHokair & Co.
summary: Fawaz Abdulaziz AlHokair & Company, together with its subsidiaries, engages in the wholesale and retail of fashion apparels. It operates through three segments: Fashion Retail, Indoor Entertainment, and Food & Beverage. The Fashion Retail segment is involved in the sale of apparels, footwears, and accessories through retail outlets. The Indoor Entertainment segment operates kids play center. The Food & Beverage segment operates cafes and restaurants. The company has operations in the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia, Jordan, Egypt, the Republic of Kazakhstan, the United States, the Republic of Azerbaijan, Georgia, Armenia, and Morocco. It operates approximately 1,842 stores across 100 shopping malls. The company was founded in 1990 and is based in Riyadh, the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia.
